prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **D16A9** (1.6L SOHC VTEC, 130 PS stock) with a **Hondata S300 v3** standalone ECU, ported and polished cylinder head by **Hasport Performance**, and a **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** paired with a **Toda Racing 84mm throttle body** for optimized airflow and throttle response.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a **Custom Spec Domani turbo manifold** (fabricated by **Full-Race Motorsports**), mated to a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) and a **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** with a **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve** for precise boost control (target: 1.2 bar / 17.5 psi).

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (Domani-specific valving, 10kg/mm front / 8kg/mm rear springs), **Cusco 22mm front sway bar** (adjustable), **Whiteline rear sway bar** (18mm), and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** (full set) for reduced compliance and improved turn-in. Braking upgraded to **DBA 4000 Series rotors** (vented, slotted) with **Hawk HPS brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines** for fade resistance.
estetica: **Vertex Lang II** widebody kit (Domani-specific, bolt-on fenders with +30mm width per side) paired with a **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (vented, 3.5kg weight reduction) and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (200mm chord, adjustable angle) for downforce at speed.

OEM+ JDM styling with **Mugen MF-10 15x7 ET38 wheels** (gunmetal finish, 195/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires) and **Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 ET32 wheels** (staggered setup for rear, 205/45R15 tires) for track use. Fender flares rolled and pulled by **Auto Fiberglass** for aggressive fitment.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro ADV racing seat** (FIA-approved, fixed-back), **Takata Drift III 4-point harness**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**, and **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a **Custom Spec carbon fiber A-pillar pod**. Sound deadening removed and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** for weight reduction and heat insulation.
